inputs.positive_prompt: A hyperrealistic, 8K photograph of an elegant, antique porcelain teapot resting on a weathered wooden table. The teapot is adorned with intricate blue floral patterns, its glossy ceramic surface exhibiting perfect subsurface scattering and subtle reflections. A single beam of warm, golden HDR lighting streams through a dust-filled window, casting dramatic shadows and highlighting the delicate texture of the porcelain and the grain of the wood. A wisp of steam curls gracefully from the spout, caught in the light. The composition is a close-up, macro shot, with a shallow depth of field blurring the background into a soft, dark bokeh. The atmosphere is one of quiet, timeless stillness, evoking a sense of cozy nostalgia.
